"id": "", "title": "", "description": "", "params": {"fontSize": 12, "openLinksInNewTab": false, "markdown": "## [PostgreSQL OTel] Workload

This dashboard monitors workload throughput:
- Transaction commit and rollback rates
- Tuple operations (insert, update, delete, fetch, return)
- Function call rates
- Rollback-to-commit ratio

| SORT commits DESC
